headline: Allstate helps drivers save on rising gas prices with mobile app and money saving tips
summary: With gas prices averaging $4 a gallon ahead of spring break travel, Allstate is helping customers save money on gas prices with free tools and simple saving tips in the Allstate mobile app.

headline: Will Allstate (ALL) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Allstate (ALL) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Aon Scales AI Compensation Data to Support Faster HR Decisions

headline: Aflac Signs First External Reinsurance Deal With Japan Post Insurance
summary: AFL expands into third-party reinsurance with Japan Post deal, boosting capital efficiency and opening new growth avenues in Japan.

headline: Carriers Expand Telematics Use, Integrate Device Capabilities and Accessibility Elements to Enhance Mobile Experience
summary: Keynova Group, the principal competitive intelligence source for digital financial services firms, today announced the results of the Q1 2026 edition of its semi-annual Mobile Insurance Scorecard. The competitive report benchmarks the mobile apps and mobile websites of the 12 largest U.S. auto and property insurance carriers, naming Progressive and GEICO as co-leaders in Overall Score for the mobile user experience.
